case_title: RODRIGUEZ, LORENZO vs. THE 24TH STREET LITTLE ITALY CORP. A CA. CORP.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, LORENZO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE 24TH STREET LITTLE ITALY CORP. A CA. CORP. $4,584.10 PRINCIPAL, $93.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,677.10
REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, LORENZO AS TO DEFENDANT THE 24TH STREET LITTLE ITALY CORP. A CA. CORP.
